calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

David I. Blumenfeld, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff ASIAN, INC.
Witness Dawndriel Lopez sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant MARK MONTEMAYOR.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Residential Rent Agreement
2-3 Day Notice to Cure or Quit
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 735 Ellis Street #16, San Francisco City and County, CA 94109.

Damages $0
Holdover damages $1018.64
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $ Per Motion
Costs $ Cost Bill
for a Total Judgment of $1018.64

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-27-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 4
Judge Pro Tem: Joshua Klipp , Clerk: Julie Rumsey Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Asia, Inc. is present. Represented by Michael Chan
Attorney David Blumenfield for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mark Montemayor is NOT present.
Attorney appearing for the defendant.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date June 27, 2016 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
